metadata.position_exact: Financial Analyst - Pictet North America Advisors SA
metadata.job_summary: Pictet North America Advisors seeks a Financial Analyst for a 4-year rotational programme in Geneva covering client relationship management, investment platform, and portfolio advisory, leading to a Relationship Manager role within Pictet Wealth Management.

research.company_mission: Partner-owned financial services group offering comprehensive service for wealthy individuals and families
research.recent_news: CHF 757B AUM and CHF 667M profit in 2025; 220+ years of partnership heritage with only 47 partners since 1805

resume.introduction: Multilingual finance professional combining cross-border M&A execution with academic grounding in portfolio management and derivatives. Moving into client-facing wealth advisory. Available from May 2026.
auraia_bullets: Managed client relationships and coordinated with legal, tax, and financial advisors across Europe, US, and Asia throughout 7 cross-border advisory mandates (EUR 5M-50M)
Sole analyst in a 3-person team, responsible for producing tailored client deliverables, maintaining structured databases, and managing data rooms under competing deadlines
Built financial models (DCF, trading comps, precedent transactions) and delivered investment presentations for Board-level meetings and investor pitches across 4 sectors
Coordinated multi-stakeholder processes from initial client engagement through transaction completion, interfacing with 10+ external parties per mandate
rc_bullets: Prepared investment memos with market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 targets
Worked directly with divisional CEO on evaluating acquisition opportunities across France and Belgium
Screened 500+ companies, shortlisted 2 for due diligence, facilitating an 80% stake acquisition
generali_bullets: Supported CFO and Head of Controlling on FP&A and strategic projects for the Swiss subsidiary (CHF 50M+ revenues)
Built automated dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs; performed variance analysis on monthly P&L
Prepared Board presentations on financial performance; assisted in annual budget planning for 5 business units

extra_entries.title: McKinsey x Keyrock Business Case Finalist
extra_entries.sentence: Developed a model to forecast market events using order book data and statistical arbitrage, presenting to senior management

extra_entries.title: AIESEC Student Club, Associate
extra_entries.sentence: Led financial recovery by sourcing corporate leads and negotiating partnerships, closing 3 deals generating CHF 60K revenue

extra_entries.title: Personal Investment Portfolio Manager
extra_entries.sentence: Manages a diversified portfolio using options strategies (Cash Secured Puts, Covered Calls), +8% annualized returns

extra_entries.title: Founder & Developer, Screeny.ai
extra_entries.sentence: Built an AI-driven tool for investment banks to identify strategic and financial acquirers, adopted by 3 advisory firms

extra_entries.title: Founder, Second-Hand Luxury Business
extra_entries.sentence: Founded and managed a luxury resale venture with a 2-person team, profitable within 6 months, 100+ units sold

resume.coursework: Investments, Derivatives, Quantitative Asset and Risk Management, Corporate Finance
resume.tools: Excel (advanced), Bloomberg Terminal, Python, VBA, SQL, PowerBI, Claude Code, ChatGPT
resume.skills: Client Relationship Management, Financial Modeling, Valuation, Portfolio Analysis, Multi-stakeholder Advisory
resume.interests: Energy geopolitics, Fitness (strength & endurance), Applied AI tools

cover_letter.subject_line: Financial Analyst - Pictet North America Advisors SA
cover_letter.paragraph_1: Pictet's partnership model, unchanged since 1805 with only 47 partners across 220 years, reflects a commitment to long-term thinking and client stewardship that few institutions can match. With CHF 757 billion in assets under management and a philosophy built on independence and responsibility, Pictet stands apart in an industry increasingly driven by short-term pressures. The Financial Analyst programme's structured rotation through client advisory, investment platform, and portfolio management offers precisely the breadth of exposure needed to build a well-rounded wealth management career.
cover_letter.paragraph_2: Over the past two years as the sole analyst in a Geneva-based M&A boutique, I have managed client relationships across 7 cross-border mandates spanning Europe, the US, and Asia, coordinated with legal, tax, and financial advisors on concurrent transactions, and delivered Board-level investment presentations. This environment required me to balance multiple projects with competing deadlines while maintaining the attention to detail that complex financial transactions demand. My earlier FP&A experience at Generali's Swiss subsidiary strengthened my analytical foundations through portfolio-level financial reporting and variance analysis across CHF 50M+ in revenues and 5 business units.
cover_letter.paragraph_3: With a dual Master's in Finance from HEC Lausanne, multilingual capabilities in French, English, Spanish, and German, and international experience across Japan, the Netherlands, and the Dominican Republic, I bring the cross-cultural fluency and client-facing mindset that Pictet's global client base requires. The programme's path toward a Relationship Manager role aligns with my ambition to combine analytical depth with long-term client advisory.
cover_letter.closing: I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

email.subject: Application - Financial Analyst (Ref. FAPNAA/RS/JJV) - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Financial Analyst position at Pictet North America Advisors (Ref. FAPNAA/RS/JJV).

I am an M&A analyst at a Geneva-based boutique with cross-border deal execution experience and a strong analytical background in portfolio management. My multilingual profile (French, English, Spanish, German) and international exposure align well with the demands of your global client base.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background can contribute to your team.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
